attributes.text: Arjun, tonight is the night. Park Street, 9 PM sharp.
Confirmed. Vikram is also on standby near Park Street.
I will use ANDROID_001. Keep 9876543210 active at all times.
Rajan confirmed the mule accounts are ready. All below 10k each transfer.
Good. ACC1001 will initiate. Split into at least 7 tranches.
WATCH_ABC shows I am 500 meters from Park Street. Arriving in 5 minutes.
Arjun, transfer work will happen near Park Street tonight.
I am ready. Coordinate with Vikram before withdrawing.
WATCH_ABC shows I am close to Park Street. In position.
Rahul, Rajan just confirmed all 7 sub-accounts are live.
ACC1001 should send the amount in small parts, below 9500 each.
Starting transfers now. Delete this chat after reading.
Cash in hand. Moving to Howrah Station now for delivery.
Confirm when Vikram reaches Howrah. I will alert Rajan.
Reached Howrah Station. Package handed over successfully.
Good work everyone. Clear your devices.

attributes.content: Big plans for tonight near Park Street. @ArjunG keep the account ready. All systems go.
Waiting near Park Street. Rahul said Vikram will confirm after the call. Everything on schedule.
Reached Howrah Station after the withdrawal. Device WATCH_ABC is still on. Job done.
Using ANDROID_001 tonight. Transfers split as planned across 7 accounts. @ArjunG confirm receipt.
All clear. @VikramK handled the delivery perfectly. Rajan confirmed receipt at Howrah.
Parked the white Hyundai TN09BY9726 near Park Street. Waiting for signal from Rahul.
